description: next/ v2.0 — Level-3 MOM OperationsRequest = the PLAN/target of manufacturing (B2MML OperationsRequest / ISA-95 Part 4). Opposite side to the OperationsResponse (the actuals). A Level-4 SalesOrder (SMProfile-CustomerOrder) TRIGGERS this L3 OperationsRequest; EXECUTED_AT an EquipmentUnit. v2.0: the order INSTANTIATES an OperationsDefinition (routing master) and decomposes per ProcessSegment into SegmentRequirements (HAS_SEGMENT_REQUIREMENT); temporal subdivisions (FO index) as Workorder (HAS_WORKORDER). Plan-vs-actual (qty_shortfall, late_delivery) is Cross-Source (it-evaluator), not a single-entity constraints block.

attributes.name: production_order_no
attributes.description: Join key — identity of the OperationsRequest. The OperationsResponse reports its actuals back via the same key (RESPONDS_TO).

attributes.name: article_ref
attributes.description: Article to be manufactured (article_no, join key to Article).

attributes.name: machine_ref
attributes.description: Planned executing machine / line (machine_no). EXECUTED_AT EquipmentUnit.

attributes.name: qty_planned
attributes.description: Planned piece count (target). Counterpart to OperationsResponse.quantity_produced. Driver of the qty_shortfall rule.

attributes.name: planned_end_time
attributes.description: Planned completion date (target). Counterpart to actual_end_time. Driver of the late_delivery rule.

attributes.name: material_ready_at
attributes.description: Time from which material is available — material-ready constraint.

attributes.name: customer_order_qty
attributes.description: Customer order quantity of the triggering order (denormalized).

attributes.name: customer_due_date
attributes.description: Customer delivery date of the triggering order (denormalized).

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Plan status of the OperationsRequest (offen (open), freigegeben (released), in_arbeit (in progress), fertig (done), storniert (cancelled)).

relationships.description: v2.0 — Inverse of SegmentRequirement.PART_OF: the target segments per ProcessSegment.
v2.0 — Inverse of Workorder.PART_OF: temporal subdivisions (FO index).

isa95.note: Level-3 MOM OperationsRequest (B2MML) = PLAN/target. v2.0: the earlier flat SegmentRequirement.MaterialRequirement projection (propertyMap) is now modeled out as a dedicated SMProfile-SegmentRequirement per ProcessSegment (HAS_SEGMENT_REQUIREMENT); the order INSTANTIATES an OperationsDefinition and can be subdivided via Workorder (FO index). article_ref/machine_ref remain a denormalized header shortcut. Plan-vs-actual = Cross-Source reconcile, not a constraints block. QUANTITY: qty_planned is optional and is omitted for continuous bulk/length-based goods (e.g. continuous web/strand goods, sold by length) — then only times/status drive the PLAN.
